name: Suspicious Program Location with Network Connections
notes:
This rule detects programs with network connections running in suspicious files system locations

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Program Location with Network Connections
SIGMA Description: Detects programs with network connections running in suspicious files system locations


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Access.ACL Permit

when the event matches Process Path (custom) contains any of [\Users\All Users or \Users\Default or \Users\Public or \Users\Contacts or \Users\Searches or \config\systemprofile or \Windows\Fonts or \Windows\IME or \Windows\addins or \$Recycle.bin or 'C:\Perflogs]
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Program Location with Network Connections on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Access.ACL Permit

AND when the event matches Process Path (custom) contains any of [\Users\All Users or \Users\Default or \Users\Public or \Users\Contacts or \Users\Searches or \config\systemprofile or \Windows\Fonts or \Windows\IME or \Windows\addins or \$Recycle.bin or 'C:\Perflogs]
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Program Location with Network Connections
Event description: Detects programs with network connections running in suspicious files system locations
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
